title: 遠いかの地が恋しくて

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mmhmm. Really? It's already that time again?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Talk about fun memories! I kinda wanna see your
tractor skills again. It's been so long, Mom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! You don't have to worry about that! I've,
uh... I've got today off!
